sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81036" key="periagwgi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιᾰγωγ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">περιαγωγεύς</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:4:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.4.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
